## Description
Brief description of the change.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style (`cargo fmt`, `cargo clippy` in `j-lang`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing (`cargo test` in `j-lang`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for user-facing changes)

## Related issues
Fixes #(issue number), if any.
